from dataclasses import dataclass
from typing import Any

@dataclass
class Token:
    kind: str        # see kinds below
    value: Any       # str for IDENT/STRING/punct, float for NUMBER, None for KEYWORD/EOF
    line: int        # 1-based
    col: int         # 1-based, column where the token starts

def tokenize(source: str) -> list[Token]:
    tokens = []
    i = 0
    line = 1
    col = 1

    keywords = {
        "let", "if", "else", "while", "for", "in", "fn",

from tinylang.parser import parse


def names_of(stmts):
    return [type(s).__name__ for s in stmts]


def test_let_stmt():
    p = parse("let x = 1;")
    assert names_of(p.stmts) == ["LetStmt"]
    ls = p.stmts[0]
    assert ls.name == "x"
    assert type(ls.value).__name__ == "NumberLit"
    assert ls.value.value == 1.0


def test_precedence_mul_before_add():
    p = parse("let x = 1 + 2 * 3;")
    rhs = p.stmts[0].value
    assert type(rhs).__name__ == "BinaryOp"
    assert rhs.op == "+"
